ItacPersonItem.Notes: Matteazzi joined the Ricovrati in 1599. Two orations were recited in the Academy on the occasion of his funeral, the entire Academy was covered with back drapes, and academicians` poems were hanged on the walls. See Attilio Maggiolo for more details. His portrait comes from Tomasini, Illustrium virorum elogia (1630). See also Giovanni Diquattro, `Angelo Matteacci: un giurista "culto" nella Repubblica di Venezia`, in Studi veneziani (1998).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
